signals.headline: SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]
signals.raw:
SEC Drops Long-Running Lawsuit Against Ripple Labs** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2]

The U.S. SEC's decision to drop its lawsuit against Ripple has been confirmed as resolved, removing a major regulatory overhang and driving XRP's ~10% weekly price surge to ~$1.42 after breaking $1.50 resistance[1][6]. This fundamental shift boosts institutional sentiment amid RLUSD stablecoin rollout on XR
